headline: SBA Celebrates Success of First-Ever Made In America Matchmaking Expo for Suppliers and Manufacturers
summary: 675 Small Businesses Connected with Dozens of Large Companies to Reshore American IndustryWASHINGTON, March 19, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Today, the U.S. Small Business Administration (SBA) announced the results of its inaugural 2026 Supplier Matchmaking Expo, a first-of-its-kind event held last week in partnership with the National Association of Manufacturers (NAM) in Charlotte, North Carolina. The Expo was designed to advance the Made in America agenda by helping large producers connect with s
